title: pavonia dregei
intro: Pavonia dregei, also known as the Red Sage or Cape Mallow, is a flowering plant native to southern Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from the plant's bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and glycosides. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its potential health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, Pavonia dregei is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
